description: Recon-ng: A full-featured Web Reconnaissance framework built in Python mirroring Metasploit's powerful internal database and modular architecture.

commands.explanation: Launches the interactive modular console structure locking the CLI into the explicit Recon-ng framework.
Contacts the centralized module repository to download necessary APIs and exploitation scripts.
Searches the central repository module listing for scripts containing the defined keyword or capability.
Instantiates a completely isolated internal sqlite database container guaranteeing the current target's intel does not blend into older campaigns.
Engages a specific installed module moving the framework context over to its specific payload parameters.
Extracts the parameter structure required for the currently loaded module ensuring you know exactly what variables to set.
Defines the required global execution constraints or targeted domain spaces for the active loaded module.
Permanently installs authorization tokens allowing modules to seamlessly interact with rate-limited global intelligence databases.
Instructs the currently loaded, perfectly-configured module to actively process the intelligence operation.
Prints out the raw internal data logic acquired during executions (e.g. hosts, domains, ports, vulnerabilities) into standard columns.
